item.title: It’s not just a sweet, sweet fantasy: Mariah Carey has relea…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:

Details ↓

item.title: Recognizing Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Recognizing Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could set a dangerous precedent, with other countries attempting to claim important waterways, analysts say. n.pr/4fjiTJY
item.content:encoded: Recognizing Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could set a dangerous precedent, with other countries attempting to claim important waterways, analysts say. n.pr/4fjiTJY

item.title: The NPR Network has never backed down on its mission, becaus…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description:
The NPR Network has never backed down on its mission, because millions of people rely on this trusted journalism and programming, and because of supporters like you who stand with us.

Power the NPR Network. Make your first gift, or increase your support today.

Donate now: n.pr/3SzxYze
item.content:encoded:
The NPR Network has never backed down on its mission, because millions of people rely on this trusted journalism and programming, and because of supporters like you who stand with us.

Power the NPR Network. Make your first gift, or increase your support today.

Donate now: n.pr/3SzxYze

item.title: As Canadian wildfires spread smoke across the U.S. the air p…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: As Canadian wildfires spread smoke across the U.S. the air pollution is dangerous to health. But there are ways to protect yourself. Here's what to know. n.pr/4wFOwEs
item.content:encoded: As Canadian wildfires spread smoke across the U.S. the air pollution is dangerous to health. But there are ways to protect yourself. Here's what to know. n.pr/4wFOwEs

item.title: Gracie Abrams Cuts Deep on ‘Daughter From Hell’ The star’s …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Gracie Abrams Cuts Deep on ‘Daughter From Hell’

The star’s third album, out today, dives more fully into her inner world, with a bigger, more satisfying sound to match.

Read our ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️+ review: bit.ly/44CCPCJ
item.content:encoded:
Gracie Abrams Cuts Deep on ‘Daughter From Hell’

The star’s third album, out today, dives more fully into her inner world, with a bigger, more satisfying sound to match.

Read our ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️+ review: bit.ly/44CCPCJ

item.title: Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday convened leaders …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday convened leaders from more than 60 countries to take part in the Trump administration's latest effort to quell what it calls "left wing" political terrorism. n.pr/4fqIeBX
item.content:encoded: Secretary of State Marco Rubio on Thursday convened leaders from more than 60 countries to take part in the Trump administration's latest effort to quell what it calls "left wing" political terrorism. n.pr/4fqIeBX

item.title: Across months of conversations in Los Angeles and Paris, Ste…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Across months of conversations in Los Angeles and Paris, Steve Lacy explained how new love, creative doubt, and relentless rewriting transformed an album that was still finding itself.

Read: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Across months of conversations in Los Angeles and Paris, Steve Lacy explained how new love, creative doubt, and relentless rewriting transformed an album that was still finding itself.

item.title: Smoke from wildfires in Canada and Minnesota is sending air …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Smoke from wildfires in Canada and Minnesota is sending air quality indexes to record levels, posing a hazard for millions of people. Here are tips for how to breathe easier in your home. n.pr/4vwW4bJ
item.content:encoded: Smoke from wildfires in Canada and Minnesota is sending air quality indexes to record levels, posing a hazard for millions of people. Here are tips for how to breathe easier in your home. n.pr/4vwW4bJ

item.title: Both Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to sunset…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Both Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to sunset the foreign aid agency, have said that no deaths have been linked to the cutting of its funding. These parents tell a different story. n.pr/4fFJzG7
item.content:encoded: Both Marco Rubio and Elon Musk, who led the effort to sunset the foreign aid agency, have said that no deaths have been linked to the cutting of its funding. These parents tell a different story. n.pr/4fFJzG7

item.title: Brenda Fricker, Oscar-Winning Actress and Pigeon Lady in ‘Ho…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Brenda Fricker, Oscar-Winning Actress and Pigeon Lady in ‘Home Alone 2,’ Dead at 81

Fricker became the first Irish actress to earn an Academy Award with a Best Supporting Actress Oscar for 'My Left Foot.'

Access the free article here: www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv...
item.content:encoded:
Brenda Fricker, Oscar-Winning Actress and Pigeon Lady in ‘Home Alone 2,’ Dead at 81

Fricker became the first Irish actress to earn an Academy Award with a Best Supporting Actress Oscar for 'My Left Foot.'

Access the free article here: www.rollingstone.com/tv-movies/tv...

item.title: From atmospheric black metal and funeral doom to video game …
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: From atmospheric black metal and funeral doom to video game tech-death, Alice Simard’s 27 projects follow one rule: learn something new, then start another band.
item.content:encoded: From atmospheric black metal and funeral doom to video game tech-death, Alice Simard’s 27 projects follow one rule: learn something new, then start another band.

item.title: One of the best psych-folk albums of 2026 was made by a duo …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
One of the best psych-folk albums of 2026 was made by a duo from Philly whose name is a punctuation symbol.

Get familiar with @ in our new interview. (It’s pronounced “at,” if you’re wondering.) ↓
item.content:encoded:
One of the best psych-folk albums of 2026 was made by a duo from Philly whose name is a punctuation symbol.

Get familiar with @ in our new interview. (It’s pronounced “at,” if you’re wondering.) ↓

item.title: NPR member station photographers captured images of World Cu…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: NPR member station photographers captured images of World Cup watch parties outside stadium gates, on street corners and in public parks and squares as the World Cup became, for a brief period, a part of local life. n.pr/4fc6APq
item.content:encoded: NPR member station photographers captured images of World Cup watch parties outside stadium gates, on street corners and in public parks and squares as the World Cup became, for a brief period, a part of local life. n.pr/4fc6APq

item.title: This week’s Essential Releases include lush queer country, s…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: This week’s Essential Releases include lush queer country, shadowy experimental sounds, and a compilation of pop songs devoted to our pets. Hear what the Bandcamp Daily editors are listening to right now.
item.content:encoded: This week’s Essential Releases include lush queer country, shadowy experimental sounds, and a compilation of pop songs devoted to our pets. Hear what the Bandcamp Daily editors are listening to right now.

item.title: Everyone knows that red means danger, but how did purple bec…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Everyone knows that red means danger, but how did purple become a cautionary color? At an EPA conference in the late 1990s, attendees nearly came to blows over color coding on the Air Quality Index.
item.content:encoded: Everyone knows that red means danger, but how did purple become a cautionary color? At an EPA conference in the late 1990s, attendees nearly came to blows over color coding on the Air Quality Index.

item.title: One day after a scary on-set incident where an intruder conf…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:

Watch/Read ↓
item.content:encoded:

item.title: The military said Friday it used intelligence sources to tar…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The military said Friday it used intelligence sources to target militants over the previous 24 hours. The operations were in response to attacks by militants earlier in the week. n.pr/4vvLEZX
item.content:encoded: The military said Friday it used intelligence sources to target militants over the previous 24 hours. The operations were in response to attacks by militants earlier in the week. n.pr/4vvLEZX

item.title: Might the Stones pull a Harry Styles and block-book Madison …
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Might the Stones pull a Harry Styles and block-book Madison Square Garden?

Could they hit three or four big stadiums?

What about a single blowout gig to wrap it all up?

There are many ways this could play out. Here are some scenarios: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...
item.content:encoded:
Might the Stones pull a Harry Styles and block-book Madison Square Garden?

Could they hit three or four big stadiums?

What about a single blowout gig to wrap it all up?

There are many ways this could play out. Here are some scenarios: www.rollingstone.com/music/music-...

item.title: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japane…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japanese Emperor. But the country's first female prime minister opposes it. n.pr/4wTpGkR
item.content:encoded: A popular princess drives support for having a female Japanese Emperor. But the country's first female prime minister opposes it. n.pr/4wTpGkR
